title: GUT Framework Installation Guide
purpose: Install Godot Unit Testing (GUT) framework to enable automated unit/integration tests

steps.title: Clone GUT repository
steps.expected_result: addons/gut/ directory created with GUT framework files
steps.troubleshooting: If git fails, download ZIP from https://github.com/bitwes/Gut/releases and extract to addons/gut/

steps.title: Enable GUT plugin in Godot Editor
instructions: Go to Project > Project Settings > Plugins
Enable the plugin (checkbox on the right)
steps.expected_result: GUT panel appears in bottom dock
steps.troubleshooting: If plugin not visible, verify addons/gut/plugin.cfg exists

steps.title: Create test directories
steps.note: GUT looks for tests in res://test/ by default

steps.title: Copy initial test file
instructions: If not, this file contains 7 unit tests for MerlinStore
steps.note: File already created at scripts/test/test_merlin_store.gd by AUTODEV worker

steps.title: Configure GUT test runner
instructions: In Godot Editor, click GUT panel (bottom dock)
steps.expected_result: GUT configured to find tests in res://test/
steps.troubleshooting: If tests not found, verify path format (res:// prefix required)

steps.title: Run first test suite (GUI)
instructions: Observe test results in GUT panel
steps.expected_result: 7 tests from test_merlin_store.gd execute (may fail if MerlinStore structure differs)
steps.troubleshooting: If all tests fail, verify MerlinStore.gd exists at scripts/merlin/merlin_store.gd and has expected methods (dispatch, check_run_end)

steps.title: Run tests from command line (CI/CD integration)
steps.expected_result: GUT runs headless, outputs results to console, exits with code 0 (pass) or 1 (fail)
steps.note: Use this command in validate.bat or AUTODEV pipeline

steps.title: Integrate with validate.bat
instructions: Add GUT execution step after validate_flow_order.ps1
steps.expected_result: GUT tests run automatically as part of validation pipeline

checklist: GUT plugin enabled in Godot Editor
test_merlin_store.gd runs successfully (or fails with actionable errors)
verification.success_criteria: At least 1 test file runs (pass or fail), GUT reports test count

common_issues.issue: Plugin not appearing in Godot Editor
common_issues.solution: Re-clone GUT repository, verify addons/gut/plugin.cfg exists
Verify 'Test Directory' in GUT settings is 'res://test/' (not 'test/' or 'C:\...')

common_issues.issue: All tests fail with 'Script does not exist'
common_issues.cause: Test file references preload() path that does not exist
common_issues.solution: Verify MerlinStore.gd exists at res://scripts/merlin/merlin_store.gd, adjust path in test file if needed

common_issues.issue: GUT command line exits with code 1 but no failures shown

next_steps_after_installation: Run test_merlin_store.gd and fix any failures (likely due to MerlinStore API differences)
Write 3 additional test files: test_card_system.gd, test_effect_engine.gd, test_edge_cases.gd
Integrate GUT into aggregate_test_results.ps1 (parse GUT JSON output)
Set up coverage tracking (GUT coverage plugin or manual instrumentation)
Document test writing conventions in debug_qa.md or gdscript_knowledge_base.md
resources: GDScript testing patterns (M.E.R.L.I.N. project): .claude/agents/debug_qa.md (Section: GUT Testing Framework)
